Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-17-superpowers-gh-workflow-integration-design.md
Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-17-pd-book-tools-pydantic-core-schemas.md

Add Pydantic core schemas to geometry/OCR model classes for JSON codegen and validation.

nodes.body: Implemented in commits 9f9fabd–ca84058 and d6ad9d2: Pydantic core schemas for BoundingBox, Point, Character, Word, Block, Page. schemas.emit CLI added in 6377cc4.

issue.title: Spec: Pydantic core schemas for geometry and OCR model classes
Re-add models to `PUBLIC_MODELS` + restore narrowed tests + full CI
